title: Stylish Stiles
body:
![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KMnzveQJ/images/e110bb48c471db1f2065d257f4d5b03cdf8feeac.png)

# Stylish Stiles
Are you sick and tired of placing carpets on fences? Me too! No longer shall our immersion be torn asunder!

This mod adds 12 new fence blocks that function identically to carpeted fences. Players can jump over stiles whilst mobs do not. 

Fully integrates with vanilla fences.

## Dependencies
Fabric-api required for Fabric version
